document_summary: Certificate of Honor from the Communication Association of China, awarding Dehuan Liu and Chen Cui the Excellent Paper Award at the 11th China Communication Conference for their paper on internet media challenging traditional media in the time dimension. Issued July 10, 2010. Direct proof of a nationally recognized scholarly award.

snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Title of the award certificate directly issued to applicant Dehuan Liu, establishing the formal nature of the recognition.

snippets.text: To Dehuan Liu and Chen Cui:
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Directly names Dehuan Liu as the recipient of the award certificate.

snippets.text: Your paper titled "Challenges Posed by the Internet to Traditional Media in the Time Dimension - A Study on the Possibility of Internet Media Usage Time Surpassing Traditional Media Usage Time" has won the Excellent Paper Award at the 11th China Communication Conference. This certificate is issued as an encouragement.
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Core evidence: specifies the exact paper title, the award name (Excellent Paper Award), and the conference (11th China Communication Conference). Direct proof of Liu's nationally recognized award.

snippets.text: (Stamp) Communication Association of China The 11th China Communication Conference Organizing Committee July 10th, 2010
snippets.subject: Communication Association of China
snippets.reasoning: Identifies the awarding body (Communication Association of China) and date (July 10, 2010), establishing the official and institutional nature of the award.
